name: Teleste Corporation
summary: Teleste Corporation provides video and broadband solutions, and network services in Finland and internationally. The company's Video and Broadband Solutions segment focuses on product solutions for broadband access networks, video service platforms, and video surveillance applications. Its Network Services segment offers network service solutions, including construction, rebuilding, upgrading, planning, and maintenance services for cable networks. The company's broadband data and video products include RF amplifiers, optical nodes, remote PHY nodes, RF passives, optical passives, management tools, DOCSIS mini-CMTS, headend optics, Luminato video headend products, and Optimo transcoders, as well as modular IP to analog TV and IP to FM radio converters, and broadcast manager solutions. Its information and security products consist of passenger information management products, media content management products, fleet monitoring and operation control products, information displays, display control products, onboard passenger information systems, onboard infotainment and advertising products, onboard public address and intercommunications products, onboard video surveillance products, onboard connectivity products, video management systems, mobile network video recorders, fiber optic video transmission products, video encoders and decoders, secured IP link products, and S-AWARE situational awareness systems. In addition, the company provides information and security services, such as technical integration, software support and maintenance, system design, software integration and solutions, project management, configuration, installation and commissioning, and training; and broadband data and video services. It serves the hospitality, public transport, public authorities, airports, road, and military and border control markets, as well as installers, operators, and wholesalers and distributors. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Littoinen, Finland.
